descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Delta Flyers 6-5 in overtime to win BCJHL Coastal Division final series 4-0.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes defeated the Delta Flyers 6-5 in sudden-death overtime on Saturday at Sungod Arena, clinching the BCJHL Coastal Division final series in four straight games. Paul Rutherford scored the overtime winner at 4:37 of the extra session. Despite Chris Dickson's spectacular performance stopping 49 shots, Delta was eliminated. Richmond will advance to face Kelowna Packers for the league championship. Coach Orland Kurtenbach praised the team's execution and Delta's goaltending.
